name: CLX - MGA Insurance Needs Analysis v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Triggered when conversation handler completes the suitability interview. Reads suitability_assessments.client_situation WHERE vertical_id='insurance', asks Claude for a comprehensive needs analysis (coverage gaps, recommended amounts, risk factors, tax + estate considerations under FSRA Ontario + Canadian tax law), persists to needs_analysis jsonb + ai_recommended_* columns, triggers A2.3 policy recommendation engine.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $json.client_id, action_id: null, cost_type: 'claude_token', units: $json.tokens || 0, unit_cost_cents: 0.0003, vendor: 'anthropic', recorded_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', suitability_assessment_id: $('Build Patch').item.json.assessment_id }) }}
